raw.advertiser_name: 윈조이 포커 - 블랙잭, 바카라, 슬롯, 로우바둑이

hook.summary: Anime character intro transitioning into slot machine gameplay.
hook.visual_action: An anime girl in a kimono stands in a festive street before the screen transitions to a spinning slot machine.

scene_flow: Intro with anime character in a festive lantern-lit setting.
Transition to slot machine gameplay showing bonus symbols.
Splash screen for 'Free Game' with a moonlit background.
Repetition of the anime and slot sequence for emphasis.
Final end card with game logo and download call-to-action.
audience_proxy: Adult Korean gamers who enjoy social casino apps with high-quality anime-style visuals.
